# Platform Operations

Operate adapters, cloud integrations, repositories, federation, and platform maintenance tasks.

### kiri adapter conformance-test

Run the baseline conformance suite against...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri adapter conformance-test [OPTIONS]
```

None.

## kiri azure

Query an Azure deployment of Kirimana

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri azure [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri azure list-envs`](#kiri-azure-list-envs) - List every environment of a Kirimana...

### kiri azure list-envs

List every environment of a Kirimana...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri azure list-envs [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project-name` | Kirimana project name as used in Terraform (``var.project_name``). Resource groups are scoped to ``<project_name>-<env>-rg``. | yes |  |  |
| `--project` | Path to the Kirimana repo root (for tfvars discovery). | no | . |  |
| `--subscription` | Azure subscription ID. Falls back to az's active subscription. | no |  |  |

## kiri cost

FinOps - per-contract cost rollups.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri cost [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri cost report`](#kiri-cost-report) - Print a per-axis FinOps rollup.

### kiri cost report

Print a per-axis FinOps rollup.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri cost report [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project` | Project root. | no |  |  |
| `--by` | Aggregation axis: contract \| environment \| project. Default: contract. | no | contract |  |
| `--since-days` | Only include apply-rows within the last N days. | no |  |  |
| `--cost-file` | Override the cost JSONL location. Defaults to .kiri/cost.jsonl under --project. | no |  |  |

## kiri databricks

Wire Kirimana to a Databricks workspace.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri databricks [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri databricks health`](#kiri-databricks-health) - Verify Kirimana's wiring to a Databricks...
- [`kiri databricks setup`](#kiri-databricks-setup) - Wire Kirimana to a provisioned...

### kiri databricks health

Verify Kirimana's wiring to a Databricks...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri databricks health [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--target` | Target environment from kiri.yml (default: project's default_target). The target's adapter must be 'databricks'. | no |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project root. | no |  |  |
| `--format` | Output format: text (default) \| json. | no | text |  |
| `--skip-workflows` | Skip the SCIM /Me check (use when token isn't in env). | no | False |  |
| `--skip-vault` | Skip the vault-ref check. | no | False |  |
| `--skip-catalog` | Skip the USE CATALOG check. | no | False |  |
| `--skip-schema` | Skip CREATE SCHEMA probe. Default off - runs an idempotent CREATE/DROP SCHEMA against ``_kiri_health_probe``. | no | False |  |
| `--skip-table` | Skip CREATE TABLE probe. Default off - runs an idempotent CREATE/DROP TABLE against the probe schema. | no | False |  |
| `--skip-modify` | Skip ALTER TABLE probe. Default off - verifies MODIFY grant on the probe schema (UC sink live-mode requires it). | no | False |  |
| `--skip-select` | Skip SELECT probe against information_schema.tables. Default off - verifies SELECT grant for read-direction use cases (UC catalog pull). | no | False |  |
| `--skip-workflows-manage` | Skip GET /api/2.1/jobs/list probe. Default off - verifies SP can list jobs (Can View at minimum). | no | False |  |
| `--skip-audit-delivery` | Skip ARM probe of workspace Diagnostic Settings. Default off - verifies Databricks audit logs are delivered somewhere. | no | False |  |
| `--skip-landing-storage` | Skip the ADLS landing-zone write/read/delete probe. Default off when a ``landing_storage`` block is configured; the probe self-skips when it isn't. | no | False |  |

### kiri databricks setup

Wire Kirimana to a provisioned...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri databricks setup [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--handoff` | Path to the third-party handoff YAML (see docs/integrations/databricks-azure-handoff.md). | yes |  |  |
| `--target` | Target environment name to write into kiri.yml (dev/test/prod). | no | dev |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project root. | no |  |  |
| `--skip-workflows` | Skip the Workflows /Me smoke test (use when the SP token isn't yet in env). | no | False |  |
| `--skip-vault` | Skip the vault scope smoke test (use when vault isn't wired yet). | no | False |  |
| `--skip-health-check` | Skip ALL smoke tests. Only use when handoff is incomplete. | no | False |  |

## kiri federation

Probe and inspect remote federation...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri federation [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri federation health`](#kiri-federation-health) - Probe the producer and report...
- [`kiri federation list`](#kiri-federation-list) - List contracts visible at a remote producer.
- [`kiri federation resolve`](#kiri-federation-resolve) - Look up a single contract by URN and print...

### kiri federation health

Probe the producer and report...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri federation health [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--transport`, `-t` | Transport flavour to probe with | no | http | `http`, `filesystem` |
| `--base-url` | Producer base URL (e.g. https://producer.example), required for --transport=http | no |  |  |
| `--path` | Path to export.json (or a directory containing one); required for --transport=filesystem | no |  |  |
| `--token` | Bearer token for HTTP transport; omit for anonymous-read producers | no |  |  |

### kiri federation list

List contracts visible at a remote producer.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri federation list [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--transport`, `-t` |  | no | http | `http`, `filesystem` |
| `--base-url` |  | no |  |  |
| `--path` |  | no |  |  |
| `--token` |  | no |  |  |
| `--domain` | Filter to one domain | no |  |  |
| `--classification` | Filter to one classification level | no |  | `public`, `internal`, `confidential`, `restricted` |
| `--release-state` | Filter to silver / gold / etc. | no |  | `draft`, `bronze`, `silver`, `gold`, `deprecated` |
| `--active-only`, `--include-deprecated` | Include deprecated contracts in the listing | no | False |  |

| `--path` |  | no |  |  |
| `--token` |  | no |  |  |

## kiri optimize

Compact small parquet files in the Delta...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri optimize [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile to use (dev\|test\|prod). Falls back to KIRIMANA_TARGET or the project's default_target. | no |  |  |
| `--source` | Source name | yes |  |  |
| `--table` | Table name | yes |  |  |

## kiri repo

Operator GitHub-repo automation (create +...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri repo [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri repo link`](#kiri-repo-link) - Create + link + push the GitHub remote for...

### kiri repo link

Create + link + push the GitHub remote for...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri repo link [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory. Defaults (in order) to KIRIMANA_PROJECT, the nearest kiri.yml above the cwd, then the `kiri use` active project. | no |  |  |
| `--create` | Create the GitHub repo if it does not exist (idempotent - an existing repo is adopted, not an error). | no | False |  |
| `--private`, `--public` | Create the repo private (default - DW projects are sensitive) or public (explicit opt-out). | no | True |  |
| `--dry-run` | Print the exact gh/REST + git commands and exit without creating, linking, or pushing anything. | no | False |  |

## kiri vacuum

Delete parquet files no longer referenced...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri vacuum [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile to use (dev\|test\|prod). Falls back to KIRIMANA_TARGET or the project's default_target. | no |  |  |
| `--source` | Source name | yes |  |  |
| `--table` | Table name | yes |  |  |
| `--retention-hours` | Retention window; Delta default 168h (7 days). | no | 168 |  |
| `--dry-run`, `--no-dry-run` | List files that would be deleted without touching them. | no | False |  |
| `--force`, `--no-force` | Allow retention shorter than 168h. Destructive - be sure. | no | False |  |

### Examples

```bash
kiri retention --auto``.
```

```bash
kiri vacuum`` is the Delta-specific verb. §4 introduces
```
